name: bmad-method-harness
description: A community marketplace hosting the BMAD Planning & Orchestrator — a Claude Code harness for the BMAD Method by the BMAD Code Organization, focused on planning, roadmapping, and conflict-free parallel orchestration.

plugins.name: bmad-planning-orchestrator
plugins.description: Plan, document, and orchestrate software work the BMAD way — product briefs, PRDs, architecture, epics, and ready-for-dev stories — then fan the work out as conflict-free parallel workstreams that your dev tools execute. Implements the BMAD Method (v6.x) by the BMAD Code Organization. This plugin does the planning and orchestration; it never writes the code.
